hc4be4e9dg3fb2g431fg85e3ge33f7ec5194c: Well look at you - fit as a fox, and twice as eager!

h88895074g7570g4878ga958ge8c66e0c8edc: There was a woman there. I felt drawn to her, excited by her.

haec7f719gccc9g4098g9135g5205a01228df: Tell me more about this old flame of yours.
